instruction: Evaluate the storyline of the Harry Potter series. Ensure that the words "magic" and "friendship" appear in the same sentence. The words "magic" and "friendship" can not be used in the same sentence.
response:
It is impossible to fulfill your request as stated because the condition "The words 'magic' and 'friendship' can not be used in the same sentence" directly contradicts the instruction "Ensure that the words 'magic' and 'friendship' appear in the same sentence."
